# truenas_pool_snapshot_task (Resource)

Manages a TrueNAS periodic snapshot task.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "truenas_pool_snapshot_task" "daily" {
  dataset        = "tank/data"
  recursive      = true
  lifetime_value = 30
  lifetime_unit  = "DAY"
  naming_schema  = "auto-%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M"

  schedule = {
    minute = "00"
    hour   = "0"
    dom    = "*"
    month  = "*"
    dow    = "*"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dataset` (String) The dataset to snapshot (e.g. tank/data).

### Optional

- `allow_empty` (Boolean) Whether to create snapshots even when there are no changes.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the snapshot task is enabled.
- `exclude` (List of String) List of child datasets to exclude from recursive snapshots.
- `lifetime_unit` (String) Unit for snapshot lifetime. Valid values: HOUR, DAY, WEEK, MONTH, YEAR.
- `lifetime_value` (Number) How long to keep snapshots (numeric part).
- `naming_schema` (String) Naming schema for snapshots. Uses strftime-style format.
- `recursive` (Boolean) Whether to take recursive snapshots of child datasets.
- `schedule` (Attributes) The snapshot schedule. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the snapshot task.

<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Optional:

- `begin` (String) Start time of the allowed window (HH:MM).
- `dom` (String) Day of month field (1-31, *, or cron expression).
- `dow` (String) Day of week field (0-6, *, or cron expression).
- `end` (String) End time of the allowed window (HH:MM).
- `hour` (String) Hour field (0-23, *, or cron expression).
- `minute` (String) Minute field (0-59, *, or cron expression).
- `month` (String) Month field (1-12, *, or cron expression).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import truenas_pool_snapshot_task.example 1
```
